objective: Validate and fix the context_orchestrator and qdrant_semantic_search MCP servers.
verification: Manual stdio MCP client check against dist/main.js for tool listing and redacted search_mcp_servers output
Manual stdio MCP client check against qdrant-semantic-search-mcp.cmd for tool listing and compatible-collection semantic search

outcome.context_orchestrator: Working over stdio with 13 tools; MCP config search now redacts env blocks and cache versioning refreshes stale search hits.
outcome.qdrant_semantic_search: Working over stdio with 4 tools; all-collection search now skips incompatible vector dimensions and returns no raw dimension failures.
